strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Founder of open-source GIS platform plus active community teaching, talks, and workshops demonstrating thought leadership
concerns: No master's or PhD in an AI-related field and limited demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale
Title history tops out at Staff/Senior — no prior Principal, Director, or strategic advisory role at director level
Minimal evidence of cloud-platform strategy work or advising strategic customers and partners

key_factors.factor: Director-level IC and strategic advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of versatile engineering across many stacks, open-source founding experience, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, which partially aligns with the role's AI focus. However, the role targets a director-level IC shaping cloud and AI strategy with recognized AI expertise and advisory reach, and the resume shows neither prior principal/strategy-level scope nor a track record of shipped AI products or platforms at that altitude.
